message:
feat(fnp-python): native tril/triu via shared triangular_impl helper

Port np.tril and np.triu out of the numpy passthrough pool. Both route
through UFuncArray::tril / UFuncArray::triu for real numeric inputs and
fall back to numpy for complex, integer sidecar, structured, and
object-array cases. k-offset (positive/zero/negative) and N-D batch
semantics are preserved via the UFuncArray kernels.

br-franken_numpy-hswb
